ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rental period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rental period */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car being rented */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer renting the car */,
  "pickup_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pickup location */,
  "return_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the return location */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the rental */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., booked, in progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rental was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rental was last updated */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservation */,
  "customer_feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback after the rental */,
  "return_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the car upon return */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Late fee incurred */,
  "cancellation_fee" TEXT /* Cancellation fee incurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_return_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_pickup_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the car */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the car */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the car */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Fuel type (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the car (e.g., available, rented, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the car was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the car was last updated */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the next service */,
  "service_interval" TEXT /* Service interval in miles or months */,
  "is_inspected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car has been inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES car_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the car type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car type */,
  "daily_rate" TEXT /* Daily rental rate */,
  "weekly_rate" TEXT /* Weekly rental rate */,
  "monthly_rate" TEXT /* Monthly rental rate */,
  "insurance_rate" TEXT /* Insurance rate for the car type */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency in miles per gallon */,
  "max_seats" INTEGER /* Maximum number of seats */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the car type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the car type was last updated */,
  "is_electric" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type is electric */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type is hybrid */,
  "is_automatic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type has an automatic transmission */,
  "is_manual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type has a manual transmission */,
  "is_available_for_reservation" INTEGER /* Indicates if the car type is available for reservations */,
  "minimum_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age required to rent this car type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State of the driver's license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals by the customer */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "is_loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a loyalty member */,
  "last_rental_date" TEXT /* Date of the last rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location was last updated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "mechanic_name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanic */,
  "mechanic_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the mechanic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  "next_service_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage at which the next service is due */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* Parts used during maintenance */,
  "service_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel log */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car being fueled */,
  "fuel_date" TEXT /* Date of the fueling */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of fuel added in gallons */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the fuel */,
  "filled_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who fueled the car */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  "fuel_level_before" TEXT /* Fuel level before refueling */,
  "fuel_level_after" TEXT /* Fuel level after refueling */,
  "fuel_station" TEXT /* Fuel station where the car was fueled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* User name for logging in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, create rental) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., rentals, cars, customers) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the reservation */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car being reserved */,
  "pickup_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pickup location */,
  "return_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the return location */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date of the pickup */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reservation was last updated */,
  "pickup_time" TEXT /* Time of the pickup */,
  "return_time" TEXT /* Time of the return */,
  "is_late_return" INTEGER /* Indicates if the return was late */,
  "late_return_fee" TEXT /* Late return fee incurred */,
  "is_canceled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reservation was canceled */,
  "cancellation_fee" TEXT /* Cancellation fee incurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_return_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_pickup_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
